meaning: n.瀹剁暅鏍弙t.鍏冲叆鏍忎腑
examples: Embarking on a recuperative cruise, Pinfold begins to hear voices on the ship that he believes are part of a wireless system capable of broadcasting into his head;
Have you been in Alltami, were you in Pinfold Lane and saw anything?
The site in Pinfold Gate closed on Tuesday night and will be replaced by a new unit at Loughborough Hospital.
Police say the search for her remains focussed around a quarry, pools and woodland in Pinfold Lane, Alltami, where her burnt-out car was discovered.
